info.description:
# AI Real Estate Assistant API

Conversational AI platform for property search, market analysis, and investment tools.

## Authentication

- **API Key** — pass via `X-API-Key` header for general access
- **JWT Bearer** — pass via `Authorization: Bearer <token>` for user-scoped features (favorites, saved searches, market data, etc.)

## Base URL

```
/api/v1
```

All endpoints listed below are mounted under this prefix.
info.title: AI Real Estate Assistant - Modern

get.description:
Aggregated admin dashboard endpoint (Task #67).

Combines health, cache, latency, vector store, and system stats
into a single JSON response for frontend admin panel consumption.

schema.title: Response Admin Dashboard Api V1 Admin Dashboard Get

post.description:
Get sheet names from an Excel file.

Returns available sheets and their row counts for sheet selection UI.

Get sheet names from an uploaded Excel file.

Returns available sheets and their row counts for sheet selection UI.
Supports: .xlsx, .xls, .ods files.

get.description: Detailed health check for admin.

post.description:
Trigger data ingestion from URLs.
Downloads CSV/Excel files, processes them, and saves to local cache.
Does NOT automatically reindex vector store (call /reindex for that).
Enforces max_properties limit from settings.

Upload and ingest property data from Excel/CSV files.

Supports: .xlsx, .xls, .ods, .csv files.
Maximum file size: 25MB.
Does NOT automatically reindex vector store (call /reindex for that).

get.description:
Query MCP audit logs with filters.

Requires API key authentication.

Returns paginated audit log entries matching the specified filters.

post.description:
Run cleanup of expired MCP audit logs.

Requires API key authentication.

By default, runs in dry-run mode (no files deleted).
Set dry_run=false to actually delete files.

get.description:
Get audit entries for a specific connector.

Requires API key authentication.

Returns paginated entries for the specified connector.

Get all audit entries for a specific request ID.

Requires API key authentication.

Useful for tracing a request through multiple connector calls.

schema.title: Response Get Entries By Request Id Api V1 Admin Mcp Audit Request  Request Id  Get

get.description:
Get storage metrics for MCP audit logs.

Requires API key authentication.

Returns information about log file storage including:
- Number of files
- Total size
- Date range
- Expired files count
Return comprehensive API metrics for monitoring dashboard.

schema.title: Response Admin Metrics Api V1 Admin Metrics Get

get.description:
Return p95 latency metrics for search and chat endpoints (Task #120).

SLA targets:
  - search: p95 < 2000 ms
  - chat:   p95 < 8000 ms

schema.title: Response Admin Latency Metrics Api V1 Admin Metrics Latency Get

get.description:
List all available portal adapters.

Returns information about each portal including:
- Whether it's configured (has API key if required)
- Rate limit information

post.description:
Fetch property data from an external portal.

Uses the specified portal adapter to fetch properties based on filters.
The fetched data is automatically ingested into the property cache.
Reindex data from cache to vector store.

get.description: List deals for the current agent with optional filtering.

post.description: Create a new deal when a lead converts.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific deal.

patch.description: Update deal status and other fields.

get.description: Get comprehensive performance metrics for the current agent including leads, deals, conversion rates, and financial data.

parameters.description: Start of analysis period (default: 30 days ago)
parameters.name: period_start

schema.description: Start of analysis period (default: 30 days ago)
schema.title: Period Start

get.description: Compare current agent's performance to team averages with rankings.
Get progress towards active goals.
Get AI-powered coaching insights with actionable recommendations.
Get performance trends over time with configurable intervals.
Identify agents who may need coaching support (admin only).
Get leaderboard of top performing agents (admin only).
Get paginated list of agents with optional filters.

parameters.description: Sort by: rating, listings, reviews, created
parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sort by: rating, listings, reviews, created
schema.title: Sort By

get.description: Get viewing appointments for the authenticated agent.
Get inquiries for the authenticated agent.
Get the authenticated agent's profile.

post.description: Create an agent profile for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get detailed agent profile by ID.

post.description: Send an inquiry to an agent (contact form).

get.description: Get properties listed by an agent.

post.description: Request a property viewing appointment with an agent.

get.description: List market anomalies with optional filters.
Get anomaly statistics summary.

Stream real-time anomaly updates via Server-Sent Events.

This endpoint establishes a long-lived connection for pushing
real-time anomaly detections to connected clients.
Get a specific anomaly by ID.

post.description: Dismiss an anomaly.

schema.title: Response Dismiss Anomaly Api V1 Anomalies  Anomaly Id  Dismiss Post

get.description: Query audit log entries with filters and pagination.
Verify hash-chain integrity of the audit log.
Get a single audit log entry by ID.

post.description: Admin endpoint to unlock a user account that was locked due to failed login attempts.
Request a password reset email.
Authenticate user and return tokens.
Invalidate the current session and clear cookies.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile.
Redirect to Apple for Sign In.

schema.title: Response Apple Oauth Start Api V1 Auth Oauth Apple Get

get.description: Handle OAuth callback from providers.
Redirect to Google for OAuth authentication.

schema.title: Response Google Oauth Start Api V1 Auth Oauth Google Get

post.description: Exchange refresh token for new access token.
Create a new user account with email and password.

schema.title: Response Request Code Api V1 Auth Request Code Post

post.description: Request a new email verification token.
Reset password using token from email.
Verify user email with token sent via email.

get.description:
List bulk jobs with pagination and filtering.

Supports filtering by:
- job_type: import or export
- status: pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled
- source_type: url, file_upload, portal_api, search

post.description:
Start a new bulk export job.

The export runs in the background using FastAPI BackgroundTasks.
Use GET /bulk-jobs/{job_id} to check progress and get download URL.

Start a new bulk import job.

The import runs in the background using FastAPI BackgroundTasks.
Use GET /bulk-jobs/{job_id} to check progress.

delete.description:
Delete a bulk job record.

Only completed, failed, or cancelled jobs can be deleted.

get.description: Get details and status of a specific bulk job.

post.description:
Cancel a running bulk job.

Only jobs in 'pending' or 'running' status can be cancelled.
Process a chat message using the hybrid agent with session persistence.

get.description:
List user's CMA reports.

Supports pagination and filtering by status.

post.description:
Find comparable properties for a subject property.

Uses multi-factor scoring (location, type, size, rooms, recency, amenities)
to identify the most similar properties.

Returns list of comparable properties with similarity scores.

schema.title: Response Find Comparables Api V1 Cma Comparables  Property Id  Post

post.description:
Generate a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) report.

This endpoint:
1. Fetches the subject property
2. Finds comparable properties using multi-factor scoring
3. Calculates adjustments for differences
4. Produces a final valuation estimate

The report is saved and can be retrieved later or exported as PDF.

delete.description:
Delete a CMA report.

Only the report owner can delete the report.

get.description:
Retrieve a saved CMA report by ID.

Only the report owner can access the report.

Download CMA report as PDF.

Generates a professional PDF report with:
- Executive summary
- Subject property details
- Comparables grid
- Adjustments breakdown
- Final valuation
Get all collections for the current authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new collection to organize favorited properties.

get.description: Get the user's default collection, creating one if it doesn't exist.

delete.description: Delete a collection. Favorites will become uncategorized.

get.description: Get a specific collection by ID.

put.description: Update a collection's name or description.

get.description: List all data sources with pagination and filtering.

post.description: Create a new data source configuration.
Test a data source connection without saving.

delete.description: Delete a data source. Requires confirm=true to prevent accidental deletion.

get.description: Get a specific data source by ID.
Get sync history for a data source.

post.description: Trigger a manual sync for a data source.

get.description: List all documents for the current user with optional filters.

post.description: Upload a document file with optional metadata. Supports PDF, DOC, DOCX, JPG, PNG. Max size: 10MB.

get.description: Get documents that will expire within the specified number of days.

delete.description: Delete a document and its associated file.

get.description: Download a previously uploaded document.

patch.description: Update document category, tags, description, or expiry date.

get.description: Get all favorited properties for the current user with full property data.

Calculate investment property metrics.

Returns comprehensive investment analysis including:
- Cash on Cash ROI
- Capitalization Rate (Cap Rate)
- Gross and Net Rental Yield
- Monthly and Annual Cash Flow
- Investment Score (0-100)

This endpoint returns JSON only. For downloadable reports,
use the `/investment/report` endpoint.

Advanced investment analysis with multi-year projections.

Provides:
- Multi-year cash flow projections
- Tax implications (depreciation, deductions)
- Appreciation scenarios (pessimistic, realistic, optimistic)
- Risk assessment scoring

This is the same as the `/tools/advanced-investment-analysis` endpoint
but grouped under the investment router for better organization.

Generate downloadable investment analysis report.

Provides comprehensive investment analysis including:
- Key metrics (ROI, cap rate, cash flow, rental yield)
- Monthly/annual breakdown of income and expenses
- Investment score with category breakdown
- Optional multi-year projection with cash flow forecasts

**Report Formats:**
- **PDF**: Professional formatted document with tables and visualizations
- **Markdown**: Plain text report for easy viewing and archiving
- **JSON**: Structured data for programmatic access

**Example Request:**
```json
{
  "property_price": 350000,
  "monthly_rent": 2800,
  "down_payment_percent": 20,
  "interest_rate": 4.5,
  "loan_years": 30,
  "property_tax_monthly": 350,
  "insurance_monthly": 150,
  "include_projection": true,
  "projection_years": 10
}
```

Get current MCP connector allowlist configuration.

Returns the full allowlist including:
- Current edition
- Allowlisted connectors (CE accessible)
- Restricted connectors (PRO/Enterprise only)

post.description:
Add a connector to the allowlist at runtime.

Note: This modifies the in-memory config only.
For persistence, update the YAML file directly.

Reload allowlist configuration from YAML file.

Use this after updating the YAML file to apply changes
without restarting the application.

delete.description:
Clear all logged allowlist violations.

Use with caution - this removes audit trail.

get.description:
Get all logged allowlist violations for audit.

Returns violation records including:
- Timestamp
- Connector name
- Operation attempted
- Context and edition info

delete.description:
Remove a connector from the allowlist.

Note: This modifies the in-memory config only.
For persistence, update the YAML file directly.

get.description:
List all connectors with status.

Returns all registered connectors with their current status:
- **active**: Connector is connected and healthy
- **disabled**: Connector is configured but not enabled
- **error**: Connector has connection/health issues
- **not_instantiated**: Connector registered but no instance

Combines information from:
- Allowlist config (YAML)
- Registry (registered connectors)

Get detailed information about a specific connector.

Returns comprehensive connector information including:
- Basic info (name, description, status)
- Configuration details (sanitized)
- Rate limit settings
- Instance status if available

Perform health check on a specific connector.

Returns health status including:
- Success/failure status
- Response time in milliseconds
- Any errors or warnings
- Detailed health information

Health check for MCP connector system.

Returns:
- Overall status (healthy/degraded/unhealthy)
- Health check results for each instantiated connector

post.description:
Register a push subscription for the current user.

Args:
    body: Push subscription data from the browser
    user: Current authenticated user
    db: Database session
    device_name: Optional friendly name for the device

Returns:
    Created subscription details

Raises:
    HTTPException 409: If endpoint already registered to another user

get.description:
List all push subscriptions for the current user.

Args:
    user: Current authenticated user
    db: Database session
    include_inactive: Whether to include inactive subscriptions

Returns:
    List of subscriptions

delete.description:
Delete a specific push subscription by ID.

Args:
    subscription_id: ID of the subscription to delete
    user: Current authenticated user
    db: Database session

Raises:
    HTTPException 404: If subscription not found or not owned by user

Remove a push subscription.

Args:
    endpoint: The push subscription endpoint URL to unsubscribe
    user: Current authenticated user
    db: Database session

get.description:
Get VAPID public key for browser push subscription.

This endpoint is public (no auth required) as the key is needed
before the user can subscribe to push notifications.

Returns:

post.description:
Advanced investment analysis with multi-year projections, tax implications,
appreciation scenarios, and risk assessment.

Rank multiple properties by commute time to a destination.

Compares commute times from multiple properties to a common destination
and returns a ranked list from shortest to longest commute.

Calculate commute time from a property to a destination.

Uses Google Routes API to calculate accurate commute times including
real-time traffic conditions and transit schedules.

Generate AI-powered listing content for a property.

Generates:
- Property description with customizable tone and language
- Multiple headline variants
- Platform-specific social media content

All generated content respects platform character limits.
Calculate investment property metrics including ROI, cap rate, cash flow, and rental yield.
Calculate mortgage payments.

Calculate enhanced neighborhood quality index.

Returns scores for 8 factors:
- Core: Safety, Schools, Amenities, Walkability, Green Space
- New: Air Quality, Noise Level, Public Transport

Includes city comparison and nearby POIs for map visualization.

Analyze a portfolio of investment properties including aggregate metrics,
diversification scores, and risk assessment.

Compare renting vs buying a property over time.

Calculates:
- Monthly payment comparison
- Total cost over time
- Break-even point (when buying becomes cheaper)
- Opportunity cost of down payment
- Tax benefits of ownership
- Property appreciation impact

get.description:
List all available locations with TCO default values.

Returns a dictionary mapping country codes to lists of available regions.

post.description:
Calculate Total Cost of Ownership for a property.
Includes mortgage, property taxes, insurance, HOA fees, utilities, maintenance, and parking.

Compare Total Cost of Ownership between two property scenarios.

Provides:
- Side-by-side enhanced TCO analysis with projections
- Cost difference calculations (monthly and total)
- Break-even analysis (when one scenario becomes better)
- Trade-off analysis with pros/cons
- Priority-weighted recommendation based on user preferences

get.description:
Get location-based default cost estimates for TCO Calculator.

Returns reasonable default values for:
- Property tax rates (annual % of property value)
- Insurance rates (annual % of property value)
- Utilities per sqm (monthly)
- Internet costs (monthly)
- Parking costs (monthly)

Supports EU (DE, ES, GB, FR, IT, NL) and USA regions.
